description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
An unoccupied Zoox autonomous vehicle (Vehicle 1) was traveling northeast on a green traffic light on Brannan Street at 8th Street in San 
Francisco. At that time, a box truck (Vehicle 2), heading southwest on Brannan Street, suddenly attempted an unprotected left turn onto 8th 
Street. The Zoox vehicle braked hard to yield to the rapidly approaching Vehicle 2, when the left side mirror assembly of Vehicle 2 made 
contact with the roof-mounted left rear sensor pod of the Zoox vehicle. The Zoox vehicle stopped after the contact, and the Vehicle 2 
operator completed the turn onto 8th Street and pulled over. Shortly afterward, the Zoox vehicle cleared the intersection, pulled over, and 
then returned to base. The Zoox vehicle sustained sensor damage, and no injuries were reported.
Print
Clear Form
